citation.description: test_operator_attested_coaching_is_self_contained calls operator_evidence_issues with an operational-evidence AC item, asserts issues is non-empty (decision still fires) and contains no ADR-0043 token.

criteria.criterion: An operator-attested plan-review fixture produces the same criterion decision before and after the wording change; verified by pytest -q tests/unit/test_plan_review_portability.py.

citation.description: test_plan_review_prompts_do_not_expose_internal_adr_0043 scans all six bundled plan-review reviewer prompt files for the INTERNAL_ADR pattern and asserts the leaked list is empty. Confirmed by direct reads of E2.md, E6.md, F1.md, T13.md, T14.md, and plan_review_hedge.md — none contain 'ADR 0043'. Deterministic coaching output is also verified by test_operator_attested_coaching_is_self_contained.

criteria.criterion: Reviewer-authored finding, impact, suggested_fix, remediation, and coaching fields for a client fixture with no rebar ADR files contain no rebar-internal ADR identifier; verified by pytest -q tests/unit/test_plan_review_portability.py.

citation.description: operator_evidence_issues builds its output strings without any 'ADR 0043' or 'ADR-0043' token (confirmed by search). The six reviewer prompt files also have no such token (search returned no hits in the relevant files). The test at lines 13-35 of test_plan_review_portability.py asserts both.

criteria.criterion: Bundled plan-review prompt bodies and deterministic user-facing message templates contain no rebar-internal ADR citation; verified by pytest -q tests/unit/test_plan_review_portability.py.

citation.description: test_client_adr_present_in_target_repo_remains_grounded writes a docs/adr/0043-client-authored-decision.md file into tmp_path, calls resolve_citations, and asserts the citation remains kind=file (not downgraded). The production resolve_citations implementation at findings.py:144-190 only downgrades citations whose file doesn't exist or is denied — an existing client ADR passes through unchanged.

criteria.criterion: A client-authored ADR citation backed by a file in the target repository remains eligible as grounded evidence; verified by pytest -q tests/unit/test_plan_review_portability.py.

citation.description: The source-contract scan in test_plan_review_prompts_do_not_expose_internal_adr_0043 enumerates exactly the six reviewer prompt files — it does not scan det_floor.py, det_operator_attested.py module docstrings, or docs/adr. ADR-0043 references at det_floor.py:485 and det_operator_attested.py:2,6,40,53 are in comments/docstrings and are not touched by the scoped scan.

criteria.criterion: Internal implementation comments and docs/adr files remain outside the portability restriction; verified by the source-contract test's explicit scan scope.

citation.description: The test file is well-formed Python with valid imports (resolve_citations at findings.py:144, operator_evidence_issues at det_operator_attested.py:164). The prompt files no longer contain ADR 0043 (confirmed by source search), the deterministic coaching strings are clean, and the client ADR fixture uses production resolve_citations. No integration or external markers; the tests have no skip/xfail annotations.

criteria.criterion: The default non-integration suite exits zero; verified by pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q.
